_description: Content quality thresholds and banned-phrase lists used by validate_content_quality.py. These rules supplement — not replace — the structural contract enforced by validate_storyboard.py.

min_chars_by_field_type._note: These are advisory targets. Fields shorter than the minimum generate a density_warning, not an error.

weak_source_markers: 行业媒体/数据平台综合

4.description: Slide 4 should focus on industry value chain and profit pool first; target positioning is secondary.
forbidden_headline_patterns: 标的.{0,12}(最优|核心|制高点|利润池)

5.description: Slide 5 is industry barriers / value drivers with selective target implications, not a target-only moat page.
forbidden_headline_patterns: 标的.{0,8}(护城河|竞争壁垒|壁垒)
目标公司.{0,8}(护城河|竞争壁垒|壁垒)
5.preferred_body_focus_message: Slide 5 body_copy should contain industry-level barrier / value driver language; it reads as target-only if no industry focus terms appear in body_copy.

6.description: Slide 6 should explain competitive landscape / peer segmentation first; target positioning is secondary.
forbidden_headline_patterns: 标的.{0,12}(差异化|优势|生态位|定位|胜出)
目标公司.{0,12}(差异化|优势|生态位|定位|胜出)
forbidden_main_message_patterns: 标的.{0,20}(差异化|优势|独特生态位|占据|胜出)
目标公司.{0,20}(差异化|优势|独特生态位|占据|胜出)
6.preferred_body_focus_message: Slide 6 body_copy should contain competitive landscape / market structure language; it reads as target-only if no landscape focus terms appear in body_copy.

8.description: Slide 8 should include balanced transaction implications and explicit open diligence questions, not only positive target advocacy.
8.required_body_message: Slide 8 should include at least one explicit open diligence question / risk / validation item.
